narrative:
Andrés Andrade Cedeño is a Panama international centre-back. His overall rating of 7.23/10 places him in the top 2% of centre-backs at this tournament. This rating reflects a blend of his recent club form and his performances at this World Cup.

Andrade Cedeño demonstrates strong defensive engagement, averaging 2.333 tackles per 90 minutes at this World Cup. He also contributes significantly to breaking up play, with 1.0 interceptions per 90 minutes. His 6.0 clearances per 90 minutes highlight his ability to relieve pressure from his defensive third.

As a key centre-back, Andrade Cedeño anchors Panama's defence. Scouts and fans should continue to observe his consistent defensive actions and leadership. His high overall rating suggests he is a crucial figure for his team in the remaining tournament fixtures.
